title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: A news article detailing the massive political and media fallout from Fabio Giglietto's study. It covers how Giglietto's findings were highlighted in a national investigative broadcast on Rai3's 'Report' and how the research directly spurred European Union leaders to launch formal inquiries into Meta under the Digital Services Act (DSA).
description: An article discussing the political and public fallout of Professor Giglietto's research on Meta's algorithms, including its feature on Rai3's 'Report' and subsequent European Parliament inquiries.

title: Il ruolo di Meta nelle elezioni italiane, Floridia (Vigilanza Rai): “Necessario convocare i vertici americani della società”
snippet: An article detailing the severe political and regulatory reactions in Italy following an investigative television broadcast on Rai3's 'Report'. The public debate and subsequent calls for parliamentary hearings were sparked by Fabio Giglietto's research, which exposed Meta's algorithmic manipulation of political reach during national elections.
description: An Italian news article discussing the political backlash and calls for parliamentary hearings after Fabio Giglietto's research exposed Meta's algorithmic manipulation of political reach during elections.

title: Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino - Lumsanews

description: News article from Il Sole 24 ORE

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: This news article reports on a landmark study by Fabio Giglietto, Full Professor of Internet Studies at the University of Urbino Carlo Bo [1.1.1]. The study reveals how Meta's algorithms, designed to decrease political content, disproportionately slashed the reach of official institutional politicians (by over 70% compared to 2021) while actually expanding the visibility of anti-European and conspiracy-theorist extremist accounts.
description: An Italian news article reporting on a landmark study led by Fabio Giglietto about how Meta's algorithms suppress institutional political content while amplifying extremist accounts.
